title: Outcome Measurement, Baselines, Guardrails, and Evaluation Design · Product Reasoning Brief: Operational Measure
summary: The capstone promises impact but relies on vanity metrics, no counterfactual, unclear instrumentation, and post hoc interpretation. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the capstone operational measure increment in outcome evaluation and measurement protocol. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate each construct into observable measure, population, unit, collection method, timing, uncertainty, and interpretation limit.
Model inputs, activities, outputs, short and long outcomes, assumptions, external factors, and possible negative pathways.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments

content.text: Translate each construct into observable measure, population, unit, collection method, timing, uncertainty, and interpretation limit. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Operational Measure while producing outcome evaluation and measurement protocol.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Impact is inferred from vanity metrics after launch without a baseline, comparison, guardrail, subgroup view, or precommitted interpretation. The worked example variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Translate each construct into observable measure, population, unit, collection method, timing, uncertainty, and interpretation limit. A defensible solution applies Operational Measure, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to outcome evaluation and measurement protocol.

# Worked focus: capstone-operational-measure — Translate each construct into observable measure, population, unit, collection method, timing, uncertainty, and interpretation limit.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-4
focus: capstone-operational-measure
decision-evidence: Translate each construct into observable measure, population, unit, collection method, timing, uncertainty, and interpretation limit.
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment

steps.title: Defend the Operational Measure model · Theory Operational Measure
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Operational Measure: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Impact is inferred from vanity metrics after launch without a baseline, comparison, guardrail, subgroup view, or precommitted interpretation. For Defend the Operational Measure model · Theory Operational Measure, keep Operational Measure connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Translate each construct into observable measure, population, unit, collection method, timing, uncertainty, and interpretation limit.
